summary: Full backend + frontend testing for Amoreviamediaagency landing site clone. 6/6 backend pytest tests passed (root greeting, contact validation for missing/invalid fields, create+persist with correct destination email, list endpoint w/o _id leakage, optional company). Frontend Playwright run verified Home hero 'Next-Gen Marketing', reference background image (5m5g67sw_image.png) present as CSS background-image, all nav links (services/portfolio/about/insights) route correctly, all 4 portfolio filters work (All=4, Luxury=1, Fintech=2, SaaS=1), contact form on /contact submits successfully and a success toast 'Message sent. We'll be in touch shortly.' is shown. Home CTA also contains a contact-form. No console/page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Email delivery to Amoreviamediaagency@gmail.com is intentionally MOCKED (not implemented). Only DB persistence happens. Main agent / user must wire SMTP/SendGrid credentials when ready.
GET /api/contact is currently unauthenticated and returns all submissions (up to 500). Consider adding auth/admin protection before going live to avoid PII exposure.
Backend uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); consider lifespan context for forward-compat (minor).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed contact submissions via API during pytest run. Not cleaned up (no DELETE endpoint exists).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_amorevia_api.py; run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_amorevia_api.py -v`. Frontend uses data-testid: contact-form/name/email/company/message/submit-btn, hero-get-started, hero-explore, nav-{services,portfolio,about,insights}, filter-{all-work,luxury,fintech,saas}, project-0..3. Note GET /api/contact is public — flag for security review.
